arts.ttl: Brentford and Brighton show Interest in Fiorentina’s Michael Kayode
arts.sum: Serie A club Fiorentina is open to allowing Michael Kayode to leave as both Brentford and Brighton express increasing interest in the young defender. Reports indicate that the two Premier League teams have reached out to assess Kayode's market value, with Fiorentina considering him surplus to their needs and planning to sell him next month. The post Brentford and Brighton show Interest in Fiorentina’s Michael Kayode appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Brighton and Brentford interest ‘can quickly become concrete’, contact made – Club ‘more willing’ to let player leave
arts.sum: Brentford previously made an attempt to sign Fiorentina defender Michael Kayode and while the Bees are still interested in the youngster, there are also links with Brighton & Hove Albion. This comes from SportItalia, who have been reported on Kayode’s situation and information from journalist Alfredo Pedulla. arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest keen on signing Brighton regular – Player’s valuation ‘achievable’ for Nuno’s side
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion’s Pervis Estupiñán has ended up on Nottingham Forest’s transfer agenda. That’s at least what Bolavip are reporting, and they state the Reds are interested in the 26-year-old.
